# Basic raft interactions: elections, proposals, replication, leader transitions.
# No witness — witness interactions belong in scenario/.

setup
v1: [a1]
v2: [a1 b2]
----
v1: [a1] term=a
v2: [a1 b2] term=b

# v2 campaigns. Its log is more up-to-date, everyone votes yes.
campaign v2
----
v2 campaigns at term c
v2: yes (self)
v1:
  - term advance a -> c
  - granted vote for v2 at term c
  yes
outcome: won

# Propose and replicate. Both voters have the entries, quorum reached.
propose v2
----
v1: [a1] term=c
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c leader

append v2
----
v2 appends through c4
v1:
  - accepted append through c4 (ok)
  ok
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c committed=c4 leader

# Leader transition: v1 campaigns. Logs match, all yes.
campaign v1
----
v1 campaigns at term d
v1: yes (self)
v2:
  - term advance c -> d
  - stepped down as leader
  - granted vote for v1 at term d
  yes
outcome: won

propose v1
----
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4 d5 d6] term=d leader
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=d

append v1
----
v1 appends through d6
v2:
  - accepted append through d6 (ok)
  ok
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4 d5 d6] term=d committed=d6 leader
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4 d5 d6] term=d
